meta.poznamky: start_blocks_xml: smyčka s penDown, forward(20), forward(15) — chybí penUp mezi čárkou a mezerou.

cms.task_text: Kód kreslí čárky, ale [hlp]chybí příkaz penUp[/hlp] — želva nechává mezery vyplněné čarou. Přidejte penUp za každou čárku.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
